fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of this offer. Might be valid for a temporary period only.

fields.name: checkInDate
fields.description:
check-in date of the stay (hotel local date). Format YYYY-MM-DD
The lowest accepted value is today date (no dates in the past).

fields.name: checkOutDate
fields.description:
check-out date of the stay (hotel local date). Format YYYY-MM-DD
The lowest accepted value is `checkInDate`+1.

fields.name: rateCode
fields.description:
Special Rate - Provider Response Code (3 chars)
Examples

  * RAC - Rack

  * BAR - Best Available Rate

  * PRO - Promotional

  * COR - Corporate

  * GOV - Government (qualified)

  * AAA - AAA (qualified)

  * BNB - Bed and Breakfast

  * PKG - Package

  * TVL - Travel Industry

  * SPC - Special Promo Rate

  * WKD - Weekend

  * CON - Convention

  * SNR - Senior (Europe) (qualified)

  * ARP - AARP - American Association of Retired People (50+) (qualified)

  * SRS - Senior (qualified)

  * ROR - Room Only Rate (no breakfast)

  * FAM - Family

  * DAY - Day rate

fields.name: category
fields.description:
Special Rate Category
Examples:
  ASSOCIATION
  FAMILY_PLAN

fields.name: self
fields.description: A self link to the object. Use this to refresh the Offer price
